hero_title: Connect Case Data and Provider Checks
hero_subtitle: SFTY Business links fragmented provider outputs with case management to create structured, auditable compliance workflows that reduce manual workload and improve decision clarity.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to link case workflows with provider checks and decisions across multiple systems. This disconnect slows review processes and weakens audit trail clarity, making compliance audits and regulatory reviews harder to navigate.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates case workflows with KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule provider data into a unified operating layer that streamlines reviews and preserves audit evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From provider data to case decisions
workflow_description: SFTY integrates fragmented provider outputs into structured case workflows where reviews, decisions and evidence preservation support efficient compliance operations.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented data silos. One case connection layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects separate provider outputs with case management data to create structured workflows, decision evidence, and audit-ready review for digital asset compliance teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs connecting fragmented provider outputs into audit-ready cases with clear evidence and governance for scalable bank due diligence and enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented compliance data?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures and connects fragmented compliance checks, cases and workflows into a connected digital asset compliance operating layer for smoother onboarding and comprehensive risk visibility.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect case data and provider checks?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates provider outputs and links them to case workflows, enabling structured reviews, decision logging and consistent escalation within one system.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready case evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and supporting evidence in a traceable, audit-ready format for regulatory review and internal assessment.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY works above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, integrating their outputs without disrupting current compliance infrastructure.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, enhancing operational efficiency and auditability.
final_title: Connect provider outputs to case management
final_description: Review how SFTY links fragmented compliance data into structured cases, decision logs and audit-ready evidence for regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
